arts.ttl: Arsenal or Man Utd? Ademola Lookman has an EASY transfer decision
arts.sum: Ademola Lookman has been linked with a move to the Premier League - and data shows that there is an easy choice to make. The Italian outlet also say Atalanta will grant Lookman’s wishes to move to a bigger club at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Latest transfer news: Ademola Lookman wanted by Real Madrid and Man Utd
arts.sum: The transfer market remains closed until January but clubs are still extremely busy behind the scenes as they plan for future arrivals. Players all around the world will return to their clubs after...
